canva-01.subject: Scaling challenge at Canva — let's chat
canva-01.body:
Hi Sarah,

I've been following your work on Canva's web platform scaling challenges. Your talk at ReactConf really resonated with how we think about frontend performance.

I'm working on a project that tackles similar concurrency issues, and I'd love to get your perspective on our approach. Would you be open to a 15-min call next week?

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards,
[Your name]

canva-02.subject: API infrastructure insights
canva-02.body:
Hi Marcus,

Your blog post on system design for real-time collaboration was incredibly helpful to our team. We're solving similar problems and would value your perspective.

Do you have 20 minutes for a quick call? Happy to jump on your calendar.

Thanks,
[Your name]

canva-03.subject: Technical mentoring approach
canva-03.body:
Hi Emma,

Your approach to technical mentoring and architecture reviews has caught our attention. We're building a similar culture and would love to learn from your experience.

Would you be open to a brief conversation about how you scale technical leadership?

Cheers,
[Your name]

atlassian-01.subject: Kubernetes reliability discussion
atlassian-01.body:
Hi James,

Your KubeCon talk on Kubernetes at scale was excellent. I'm particularly interested in how you handle the reliability challenges you discussed.

We're working on similar infrastructure challenges and I'd love to share our approach. Available for a quick call this week?

Best,
[Your name]

atlassian-02.subject: Collaboration tools at scale
atlassian-02.body:
Hi Lisa,

Your insights on building large-scale collaboration tools are directly relevant to what we're working on. The patterns you've shared in your Medium articles have become internal references for our team.

Would love to chat about your experiences building Confluence at scale.

Thanks,
[Your name]

atlassian-03.subject: Engineering culture at scale
atlassian-03.body:
Hi David,

The way you build high-performing teams resonates with our engineering values. We're focused on similar principles and would benefit from your experience.

Could we grab 20 minutes to discuss how you approach team development?

Looking forward,
[Your name]

linear-01.subject: Quality + velocity approach
linear-01.body:
Hi Arjun,

Your work on Linear's issue tracking engine and your open-source contributions show an exceptional balance between quality and velocity. This is exactly the engineering approach we admire.

Would you be interested in discussing how you maintain that balance while shipping fast?

Thanks,
[Your name]

linear-02.subject: Performance optimization expertise
linear-02.body:
Hi Sofia,

Your work on Linear's frontend performance is widely recognized. Your blog posts on React optimization have become references for our team.

We're tackling similar performance challenges and would value your perspective. Do you have time for a quick chat?

Best,
[Your name]

linear-03.subject: Database design at scale
linear-03.body:
Hi Thomas,

Your contributions to the DevTools ecosystem and your work on Linear's data layer show deep infrastructure expertise. We're facing similar database optimization challenges.

Would you be open to a brief conversation about your approach?

Thanks,
[Your name]
